(Required)
(Required)

Campaign Manager is LinkedIn's online tool for creating and managing ad accounts and campaigns. This API provides capabilities for account management, campaign group management, campaign management, creative management, ad targeting, and forecasting.
You must apply for access to the Marketing Developer Platform to use these APIs.

Contact Support:
 Name: LinkedIn Marketing API Support
